briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: Lecture des parametres de type non simple d'un objet_U a partir d'un flot d'entree.

parameterdescription.para: motlu) le nom du terme a lire

simplesect.para: (int) negative value if the keyword is not understood, otherwise positive value.

memberdef.argsstring: (int nb_fa7, const Maillage_FT_Disc &mesh, const IntVect &compo_connexes_fa7, const ArrOfDouble &fa7_surface, const DoubleTab &tab_fa7_normal)
memberdef.name: compute_friction_force_complet_tensor

memberdef.argsstring: (int nb_fa7, const Maillage_FT_Disc &mesh, const IntVect &compo_connexes_fa7, const ArrOfDouble &fa7_surface, const DoubleTab &tab_fa7_normal)
memberdef.name: compute_friction_force_projected_tensor

memberdef.argsstring: (const int nb_fa7, const int is_discr_elem_diph, const DoubleTab &gravity_center_fa7, const Maillage_FT_Disc &mesh, const DoubleTab &tab_fa7_normal, const IntTab &particles_eulerian_id_number)
memberdef.name: compute_neighbors_coordinates_fluid_fa7

memberdef.argsstring: (int nb_fa7, const Maillage_FT_Disc &mesh, Convection_Diffusion_Temperature_FT_Disc::Thermal_correction_discretization_method thermal_correction_discretization_method, const IntVect &compo_connexes_fa7, const ArrOfDouble &fa7_surface, const DoubleTab &tab_fa7_normal)
memberdef.name: compute_pressure_force_trilinear_linear

memberdef.argsstring: (DoubleVect &coord_elem_interp, IntVect &neighboring_elements, const int sauv_list_P1=0, const int num_fa7=-1)
memberdef.name: find_neighboring_elements

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &valeurs_champ, DoubleTab &coord, DoubleTab &resu, const int is_P2, const Convection_Diffusion_Temperature_FT_Disc::Thermal_correction_discretization_method discr)
memberdef.name: trilinear_interpolation_elem

briefdescription.para: Interpolation trilineaire d'un champs "valeurs_champs" aux coordonnees coord a partir des 8 elements (4 en 2D) voisins les plus proches. Valeurs_chaamps contient typiquement le champ de presssion ou le champ de temperature. On utilise egalement cette fonction pour sauvegarder la liste des elments P1 ainsi que l'indiatrice des elements P2.
